failed_rubric_items: {'rubric_item_id': 'ri_1', 'issue': 'missing_supporting_exports_and_sheet_name_mismatch', 'explanation': 'Required auxiliary exports (summary_decision_table.csv, calculation_workup.pdf) were not found and workbook sheet names (Summary, Assumptions, Sensitivity, Checks, Sources) do not exactly match rubric-required names (inputs, calculations, scenarios, validation, caveats, decision_table).'}

acceptance_tests: Workbook contains sheets named inputs, calculations, scenarios, validation, caveats, decision_table OR there is a sheet_mapping sheet documenting exact correspondences.
Recomputed technical_price and implied_rol for each scenario match the displayed values within 0.1% tolerance.
final_message.txt/stdout contains explicit file list and the mapping note for human/verifier convenience.
notes_for_worker: Keep formulas live in the workbook; do not remove them when patching cache values.
Use exact filenames requested by rubric to avoid artifact_presence_ok deductions.
If you choose to keep your current sheet naming, the sheet_mapping sheet must be first in the workbook and clearly titled so graders can find it quickly.

planned_changes.description: Generate summary_decision_table.csv from the workbook decision table data. Include columns: scenario_name, risk_load, expected_loss, expense_dollars, brokerage, technical_price, implied_rol. Save to outputs directory with exact filename summary_decision_table.csv.
planned_changes.implementation_notes: Derive the CSV rows from the same formulas/cells used to populate the workbook summary to ensure consistency.

planned_changes.description: Create calculation_workup.pdf that documents the step-by-step calculations used to derive technical price and implied ROL for low/base/high scenarios. Include formulas, intermediate values, and the explicit ROL numerator/denominator definition.
planned_changes.implementation_notes: Assemble a workbook sheet named 'calculation_workup' and render to PDF via headless LibreOffice, or programmatically generate a PDF from a template. Ensure the PDF is human-readable and included at attempt root with exact filename calculation_workup.pdf.

planned_changes.description: Rename or add sheets so exact rubric sheet names exist: inputs, calculations, scenarios, validation, caveats, decision_table. If renaming is disruptive to presentation, add a 'sheet_mapping' sheet documenting 1:1 mapping from existing sheet names to rubric names.
planned_changes.implementation_notes: Update builder script to produce these sheet names or to add the mapping sheet automatically.

planned_changes.description: Ensure key result cells contain live formulas referencing the inputs sheet and set workbook calc mode to automatic. If cache values are retained for presentation, keep formulas intact and annotate cached cells with a comment explaining caching.
planned_changes.implementation_notes: Modify builder script to write formulas and set calc properties; retain the cache-patching step only as a fallback but avoid removing source formulas.

planned_changes.description: Add manifest.json (or generation_log.txt) listing produced files and sheet mapping, and update final_message.txt/stdout to explicitly reference the added files and where they are saved.
planned_changes.implementation_notes: Include builder script name/version and generation timestamp in the manifest to help graders.

planned_changes.description: After changes, run the same verification steps used in the trace: regenerate artifacts, render PDF via headless LibreOffice, and confirm numeric recomputation matches displayed values within <=0.1% tolerance. Save verifier stdout to final_message.txt.
planned_changes.implementation_notes: Capture the commands run and any warnings; if openpyxl is unavailable in grader environment, ensure the manifest and PDF provide sufficient evidence for reviewers.

raw_model_output.revision_reason: Missing two rubric-required supporting exports and workbook sheet-name mismatch; reconciliation for ROL not explicitly shown; workbook uses patched cache values without clear mapping or manifest.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Baseline deliverable: primary workbook produced and numeric outputs are semantically correct within tolerance. Deductions were applied because two rubric-required supporting exports (summary_decision_table.csv and calculation_workup.pdf) are missing and the workbook's sheet names do not match the rubric's exact required names. The workbook also contains patched cached values to display results; please ensure formulas and recalculation properties are clearly present and provide a reconciliation table that defines ROL (numerator/denominator) and demonstrates recomputation for each risk_load scenario.
